title: Login with valid credentials
brief: Write a test case verifying that a registered user can log in with a correct email and password.
context: Login page has Email, Password fields and a Sign in button. On success the user lands on the dashboard.

title: Password reset via email link
brief: Write a test case for the 'Forgot password' flow where the user requests a reset link and sets a new password.
context: User enters their email, receives a reset link valid for 60 minutes, opens it, and submits a new password twice.

title: Add item to cart and change quantity
brief: Write a test case that adds a product to the cart and updates its quantity from 1 to 3.
context: Product page has an 'Add to cart' button. Cart shows quantity stepper and a recalculated subtotal.

title: Upload a profile photo within the size limit
brief: Write a test case for uploading a JPG profile photo under the 5 MB limit.
context: Profile settings allow JPG/PNG up to 5 MB. After upload the new photo replaces the old avatar.

title: Search products with a category filter
brief: Write a test case for searching 'shoes' and narrowing results with the 'Men' category filter.
context: Catalog page has a search box and category filters. Results update without a full page reload.

title: Registration rejects an invalid email format
brief: Write a negative test case verifying the registration form blocks an email without an @ symbol.
context: Registration form validates email format inline and shows an error message under the field.

title: Apply a valid discount coupon at checkout
brief: Write a test case for applying the coupon 'SAVE10' that gives a 10% discount at checkout.
context: Checkout has a coupon input and an 'Apply' button. The order total drops by 10% when a valid coupon is applied.

title: Change account email address
brief: Write a test case for updating the account email from the profile page, including the confirmation step.
context: Profile page lets the user enter a new email; a confirmation link is sent to the new address before the change takes effect.

title: Add to cart does nothing on mobile
brief: Write a bug report: tapping 'Add to cart' on a phone does not add the product and shows no feedback.
context: Happens on iPhone Safari, app version 3.4.1. The same action works on desktop Chrome.

title: App crashes uploading a large PDF
brief: Write a bug report: the app freezes and crashes when uploading a 12 MB PDF to a support ticket.
context: Stated limit is 20 MB. Smaller PDFs (2 MB) upload fine. Reproduced on Windows 11, Chrome 124.

title: Cart total wrong after removing an item
brief: Write a bug report: after removing one of three items, the cart total still includes the removed item's price.
context: Cart had 3 items totalling $90 ($30 each). After removing one, it shows $90 instead of $60.

title: Search returns results for an empty query
brief: Write a bug report: pressing Search with an empty field returns the entire product catalog instead of asking for input.
context: Expected behaviour is a validation message. Instead all 1,200 products load. Web app, Chrome 124.

title: Password reset email never arrives
brief: Write a bug report: requesting a password reset shows a success message but no email is delivered.
context: Tried twice, waited 15 minutes, checked spam. Account email is valid and receives other notifications.

title: Booking allows selecting a past date
brief: Write a bug report: the booking date picker lets the user pick yesterday and proceed to payment.
context: Only today or later should be selectable. Reproduced on the booking page, any browser.

title: Profile photo not updating after upload
brief: Write a bug report: after uploading a new avatar the old photo still shows until a hard refresh.
context: Upload reports success, but the header avatar keeps the previous image. Cache issue suspected.

title: Wrong currency symbol after switching language
brief: Write a bug report: switching the UI from English to German keeps prices in '$' instead of '€'.
context: Prices should localise to euro for the German locale. Numbers are correct, only the symbol is wrong.
